---
title: "Multi-Part Exam"
---

# Multi-Part Statistics Exam

Answer all parts of each question.

## Problem 1 [25 pts]

Consider the dataset: {12, 15, 18, 22, 25, 30, 35}.

**(a)** [10 pts] Calculate the sample mean $\bar{x}$.

**(b)** [10 pts] Calculate the sample standard deviation $s$.

**(c)** [5 pts] Would you expect the population mean $\mu$ to be within one standard deviation of $\bar{x}$? Explain.

## Problem 2 [25 pts]

A researcher claims that the average study time for students is 20 hours per week.

**(a)** [5 pts] State the null and alternative hypotheses.

**(b)** [15 pts] Given a sample of $n = 36$ students with $\bar{x} = 22$ hours and $s = 6$ hours, conduct a hypothesis test at $\alpha = 0.05$.

**(c)** [5 pts] What is the p-value? State your conclusion.
